description: Swordfish is a contact finder for cell phone numbers and emails, with a Chrome extension, reverse lookup, and an API.
tagline: Find cell phone numbers and email addresses
overview: Swordfish helps recruiters, sales reps, and real estate agents find verified cell phone numbers and emails through a Chrome extension, prospect search, file enrichment, reverse lookup, and an API.
what_is: Swordfish is a contact data tool for recruiting, sales, and real estate professionals. It finds accurate cell phone numbers and emails with real-time validation, and is used to bulk-find contacts, fill missing CRM details, and verify email accuracy.

Results come in seconds through search filters, file uploads, or the Chrome extension, and it fits into a GTM stack by enriching CRM records and powering API integrations. Swordfish focuses on quality contact data and enrichment rather than acting as a full CRM or marketing automation platform.
